Notes: Game rescheduled from Feb. 9 (inclement weather) ... Goldey-Beacom sets school
record with 7th win in a row ... GBC's 3rd straight win vs. Nyack ... Ashley
Rosario (GBC) ties school record by playing 110th career game ... Akilah
Sewell (GBC) has 7th career "double double" (2nd this season).
Game.Officials: Hillary Harwell (R),  Charles Bell,  Cheryl McCarthy Chiari
